crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO DYNAMIC_DNS Query to a *.qpoe .com Domain
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET INFO DYNAMIC_DNS Query to a *.qpoe .com Domain"; dns.query; content:".qpoe.com"; fast_pattern; nocase; endswith; reference:url,changeip.com; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2036010; rev:1; metadata:attack_target Client_and_Server, created_at 2022_04_14, deployment Perimeter, former_category INFO, performance_impact Low, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2022_04_14, mitre_tactic_id TA0011, mitre_tactic_name Command_And_Control, mitre_technique_id T1568, mitre_technique_name Dynamic_Resolution;)
